title: Material Card
description: An inventory item the player carries between lab stations in the 2D Lab Sandbox. The card is self-describing and honest: it always declares WHAT KIND of data it is (data_status), whether a crystal structure is actually known (structure_source), and which stations it is honestly eligible for (allowed_lab_stations). This JSON Schema is the language-agnostic contract the game client reads; backend/schemas.py enforces the same rules in Python and a test checks the two agree.

schema_version.description: Schema version the card was minted against.

material_id.description: Deterministic id (readable slug + short hash of the inputs). Same input => same id.

display_name.description: Human-facing name shown on the card in the game.

data_status.description: The epistemic status of the card's data. NEVER omitted. 'measured' is real lab data and is never invented by the sandbox.

data_status_label.description: Short human label for the HUD (derived from data_status).

formula.description: Chemical formula if known/parseable; null otherwise. Stoichiometry only — a formula is NOT a phase identity.

phases.description: Known crystalline phases. EMPTY unless a structure source genuinely provides them. A formula or composition alone never populates this.

source.description: Where the phase identity came from (e.g. 'reference_database', 'user_supplied').

composition.description: Composition with its own basis and status, or null. A composition is not a phase identity.

status.description: data_status that applies specifically to the composition (e.g. synthetic_demo, user_provided, formula_only).

structure_source.description: Whether a crystal structure / phase identity is actually known. XRD eligibility depends on this.

provenance.description: Short machine tag for where the card came from (e.g. 'reference_catalog', 'user_formula', 'user_composition', 'synthetic_demo', 'unresolved').

uncertainty_notes.description: Plain-language caveats about what is and isn't known.

allowed_lab_stations.description: One entry per station with an honest eligibility flag and reason — INCLUDING stations you cannot use yet, and why. XRD is never eligible without phases+structure; ICP is never eligible from a solid card.

warnings.description: Honesty warnings the game surfaces on the card (e.g. 'SYNTHETIC DEMO', 'UNKNOWN material — nothing invented').
